creator: pkubaj@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Gerald Pfeifer from comment #7)
I'm currently testing building gcc7 with base gcc (it looks like -O2 is the reason why base gcc segfaults). The same problem has appeared there, so it looks like it's somehow connected to building with base gcc. I still need to test more, though.

I didn't test it, but ${MV} ${STAGEDIR}${PREFIX}/lib/lib32 ${STAGEDIR}${TARGLIB32}/gcc${SUFFIX} should move the whole lib32 directory, not its contents.
